sites.title: Sites
sites.deregisterConfirm: Remove "{name}" from the register? The Appwrite project and its data stay untouched.

jobs.title: Provisioning
jobs.fieldFeaturesHelp: core + system are always included; dependencies are selected automatically.
jobs.catalogEmpty: Feature catalog is empty — run pnpm studio:jobs once.
jobs.created: Job for {name} created — the runner takes over.

entitlements.title: Features for {name}
entitlements.help: Granted features (F3 precursor) — signing and delivery to the site follow with the billing rollout.

workspaces.title: Workspaces
workspaces.empty: No workspaces yet — create the first one.
workspaces.changePlanHelp: Paid plans go through Stripe checkout; the features of all assigned sites are synced automatically after payment.
workspaces.downgradeHint: Downgrade to free: cancel the subscription in Stripe — at period end the workspace falls back to the free set automatically.

invite.successMessage: Your invitation has been accepted — you can now manage your workspace.
invite.needsLoginMessage: Sign in with your invited email address (code via email) — the invitation is applied automatically afterwards.

customer.title: My workspace
customer.subtitle: Plan, billing and sites of your workspace.
customer.empty: No workspace is linked to your account yet — follow the invitation link from your email.
customer.noBillingYet: No billing account yet — start a checkout first.
customer.downgradeHint: Manage cancellation and payment method via “Manage billing” — after cancelling, the workspace falls back to free at period end.

tenants.title: Tenants
tenants.subtitle: Host-to-customer register of the platform app: one row per customer domain — a new pool site goes live with a single entry (no build). Disabled hosts return 404 within 30 seconds.
tenants.hostHelp: Canonical hostname, lowercase, no port — e.g. kunde-a.pukalani.app. DNS must point to the platform app.
tenants.modeHelp: Pool: shared project, rows scoped per tenant. Silo: own Appwrite project.
tenants.projectHelp: Pool: the shared pool project. Silo: the customer’s own project.

validation.hostReserved: This subdomain is reserved for the platform

tenants.name: Customer name
tenants.nameHelp: The subdomain is suggested from this name — you can still edit it.
tenants.waveHelp: Silo schema updates roll out in three waves: internal (own tests) → canary (a few volunteers) → stable (everyone). Pool tenants share one project — the wave has no effect for them.
tenants.planHelp: Tiers the usage limits of the pool tenant (e.g. comments per day). Silo customers have no limit.

plans.title: Plans & limits (pool)
plans.subtitle: Quota limits per plan — apply to all pool sites without a deploy (take effect within 90 seconds). 0 = unlimited.
plans.hint: perDay counts a rolling 24 hours; total = overall per site. 0 means unlimited.

prices.title: Prices (Stripe)
prices.subtitle: Workspace plan prices — changes create a new price in Stripe and archive the old one.
prices.unavailable: Stripe unreachable or billing not configured.
prices.grandfatherNote: Existing subscriptions keep their current price (grandfathering) — only new checkouts pay the new price.
